AMICE (-1 Jan 1225).  An anonymous continuation of the Chronicle of Robert of Mo …

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Amicia Fitz William, Countess of Gloucester (also Countess of Hertford ) (1160-January 1225 ) was an Anglo-Norman nobles.

Amicia was the second daughter of William FitzRobert, 2nd Earl of Gloucester and his wife Hawise de Beaumont. She was married to Richard de Clare, 3rd Earl of Hertford, around 1180. Since Robert, the only son of her father had died in 1166, she was with her two sisters one of the heirs of her father, who owned the Honor of Gloucester and Glamorgan in South Wales. When her father died in 1183, however, took over in the face of a Welsh revolt in Glamorgan King Henry II, the administration of the heritage. Amicias younger sister Isabel had since 1176 with John Lackland, betrothed to the king's youngest son. After the death of the king in 1189 Johann married his fiancee and took over even the administration of Glamorgan. Already in 1199, however, he separated again from her. It was not until this time that he gave his brother-in-law Richard de Clare parts of the Honor of Gloucester as part of the legacy of the Earl of Gloucester, but retained himself the bulk.

Also Amicia and her husband Richard de Clare lived apart from 1200. Amicia then retired and probably had little contact with her children. She showed charity and donated a hospital in Suffolk. To do so, she made foundations for Stoke Priory at Clare. When her sister Isabel in October 1217 died childless, Amicia inherited the title Countess of Gloucester. Although he had been separated from her for a long time, her husband became her sole heir to her father's possessions. Richard de Clare died a little later, so that her eldest son Gilbert became the heir of the Honor of Gloucester. Only after her death he inherited the title Earl of Gloucester and the associated income from Gloucestershire.

«b»Descendants «/b»
1.) Amicia had several children with her husband Richard de Clare, including:

2.) Gilbert de Clare, 4th Earl of Gloucester (c. 1180-1230)

3.) Maud de Clare († after 1220)

4.) Richard de Clare (around 1184-1228)

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Amice FitzWilliam於1160年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利時，她的父親William FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucester44歲，母親Hawise de Beaumont46歲。她於1177年與Richard de Clare 3rd Earl of Hertford在英國賀特福爾賀特福德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1225年1月1日在她的家鄉享年65歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利福可斯波利 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Amice FitzWilliam于1160年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利时，她的父亲William FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucester44岁，母亲Hawise de Beaumont46岁。她于1177年与Richard de Clare 3rd Earl of Hertford在英国賀特福爾賀特福德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1225年1月1日在她的家乡享年65岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利福可斯波利 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: FitzWilliam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (of Norman origin): from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name William .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Amice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a medieval given name derived from Latin ami(ci)tia ‘friendship’ see Amity .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Amice FitzWilliam was born in 1160, in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, her father, William FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucester, was 44 and her mother, Hawise de Beaumont, was 46. She married Richard de Clare 3rd Earl of Hertford in 1177, in Hertford, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 1 January 1225, in her hometown, at the age of 65, and was buried in Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Amice FitzWilliam est née en 1160, à Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, William FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucester, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Hawise de Beaumont, avait 46 ans. Elle a épousé Richard de Clare 3rd Earl of Hertford en 1177, à Hertford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 janvier 1225, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Amice FitzWilliam 1160 in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucester 44 und ihre Mutter Hawise de Beaumont 46. Sie hat 1177 in Hertford, Hertfordshire, England Richard de Clare 3rd Earl of Hertford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. Januar 1225 im Alter von 65 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Amice FitzWilliam è nata il nel 1160 nel Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, sua padre, William FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucester, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Hawise de Beaumont, aveva 46 anni. Lei sposato Richard de Clare 3rd Earl of Hertford nel 1177, nel Hertford, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 1 gennaio 1225, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Amice FitzWilliamが1160年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアテウケスブリーで生まれた時，父William FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucesterは44歳，母Hawise de Beaumontは46歳であった。1177年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアハートフォードでRichard de Clare 3rd Earl of Hertfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1225年1月1日に故郷で65歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアテウケスブリーテウケスブリー アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Amice FitzWilliam(이)가 1160년 영국 그루스스터실르 튜케스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucester(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hawise de Beaumont(은)는 46세였다. 그녀는 1177년 영국 허트퍼드실르 허트퍼드에서 Richard de Clare 3rd Earl of Hertford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1225년 1월 1일 그녀의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 튜케스버이 튜케스버이 애브브이에 묻혔다.

mn.Clare, Suffolk, Anglo-Saxon Britain: Clare, Sudfole, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Amice FitzWilliam nasceu em 1160, em Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucester, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Hawise de Beaumont, tinha 46 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard de Clare 3rd Earl of Hertford em 1177, em Hertford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de janeiro de 1225, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Amice FitzWilliam родилась в 1160 г. в местности тюкесбури, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени William FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucester было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Hawise de Beaumont, 46. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de Clare 3rd Earl of Hertford в 1177 г. в местности хиртфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 1 января 1225 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности тюкесбури эбби, тюкесбури, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Amice FitzWilliam nació en 1160, en Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, William FitzRobert 2nd Earl of Gloucester, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Hawise de Beaumont, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Richard de Clare 3rd Earl of Hertford en 1177, en Hertford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 1 de enero de 1225, en su pueblo, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
